name: file_writer
description: Write, append, delete, move, or copy files within workspace_focus. All paths are validated against workspace_focus boundary.

op.description: Operation: write (default, atomic overwrite), append (add to end), delete (remove file or empty dir), move (rename/move), copy (duplicate file).

path.description: Path relative to workspace_focus. Source path for move/copy.

content.description: Content to write or append. Required for write and append ops.

dest.description: Destination path relative to workspace_focus. Required for move and copy ops.
